description: A plain candid color photograph with no on-image text or graphic design overlay. It shows four heavily armed tactical law-enforcement officers (apparently a Secret Service / federal protective tactical team) standing in a row behind a table on a grassy lawn, with what appears to be a government building, fountain, fencing and trees in the background (consistent with the White House grounds). All four wear all-black tactical gear: plate carriers/vests, knee pads, helmets or caps, and carry slung rifles. On the camouflage-draped table in front of them is a display of equipment, including a hard case, a rifle, helmets, a gas mask, and other tactical gear. The officers pose facing the camera. This is a documentary photo of a tactical team and an equipment display, not a designed meme/poster, so is_designed=false. The tweet text is only a blue heart and U.S. flag emoji. OCR text is detector noise.
